append_delayed_memory.description: Allows the model to append a delayed memory report into the session context.
rules: Use delayed memory actions only for already saved delayed memory reports.
Emit <LIST_DELAYED_MEMORY> when you need the current saved delayed memory report ids before choosing one.
Runtime returns delayed memory lists as trusted TOOL_RESULTS type='delayed_memory'.
Emit <APPEND_DELAYED_MEMORY: id > to append one saved delayed memory, use when user asks to include or append summary/report into the session context.
Emit <REMOVE_DELAYED_MEMORY: id > only when the user explicitly asks to remove a saved delayed memory from the current session context; it never deletes the saved report from storage.
id is a placeholder; replace it with an actual 6-character delayed memory id from TOOL_RESULTS.
After APPEND_DELAYED_MEMORY returns the report, use its content to answer the latest user request.
